title: Understanding ON Semiconductor's Growth Sustainability Through Silicon Carbide
text: Silicon Carbide (SiC) showed clear advantage over Silicon in numerous applications including inverters for electric vehicles where Tesla adopted SiC in 2018 and NIO announced transition to SiC in 2021. SiC is 10x stronger, has 9x higher dielectric stronger, 2.2x higher thermal conductivity, and 2x better Band Gap than Silicon for more efficient, compact, and lightweight driving systems.
